steps.title: Test both inequalities
steps.content: A solution must satisfy both $y\le 2x$ and $y\le -2x$.

steps.title: Check the correct pair
steps.content: For $(0,-2)$, the first inequality gives $-2\le2(0)$, or $-2\le0$, which is true. The second gives $-2\le -2(0)$, or $-2\le0$, which is also true.

steps.title: Eliminate the others
steps.content: $(2,0)$ fails $y\le -2x$, $(-2,0)$ fails $y\le 2x$, and $(0,2)$ fails both. Therefore D is correct.
